channel.title: My YouTube Podcast
channel.description: YouTube videos converted to podcast episodes
channel.itunes:author: Your Name

item.title: බිංදුවෙන් පටන් ගන්න කෙනෙක් පියවර 4කින් මූල්‍ය නිදහසට ලඟා වෙන්නේ කොහොමද?
item.description: මේ වීඩියෝ එකේ මම කතා කරන්නේ පුද්ගලික මූල්‍ය කළමනාකරණයේ ඉතාම වැදගත්ම ඉලක්ක හතර ගැන. දුප්පත් කමේ ඉඳලා මුල්‍යමය ස්වාධීන කෙනෙක් බවට පත්වීම දක්වා යන ගමනේ දී මේ ඉලක්ක පසුකර යාම ඉතාම වැදගත් වෙනවා.
item.itunes:author: Science With Ruchira

item.title: කුර්දි තුරුම්පුව කැරකෙයි ද? - Global watch Podcast
item.description:
📌 Patreon හරහා අපිත් එක්ක එකතුවෙන්න - / nextwatch
📌 වෙබ් අඩවිය : https://nextwatch.lk
📌 චිත්‍රපටි නැරඹීමට : https://flickoo.com
Welcome to NextWatch!
We are a passionate team committed to driving meaningful change in Sri Lanka by rethinking and reshaping our nation's value system through political transformation.
As engaged citizens, we have worked both on the ground and across social media to advocate for a better future. This podcast is our platform to share our ideas, spark conversations, and connect with the people of Sri Lanka.
Through NextWatch, we aim to: ✅ Challenge the flaws in our value system. ✅ Expose and question the wrongdoings in political and social structures. ✅ Inspire critical thinking and action for a brighter tomorrow.
Join us as we explore new perspectives, share stories, and work together to build a stronger, more just Sri Lanka. Let’s be the change we wish to see!
Subscribe and be part of the movement.
#mahindarajapaksa #srilankanews #akd #srilan
item.itunes:author: NEXT WATCH

item.title: The Rarest Kind of Brains on Earth
item.description:
Create a free professional website in minutes with @Odoo using my link: https://www.odoo.com/r/z9OU
Pre-order my new book, The Terrible Paradox of Self-Awareness (out March 10, 2026): https://www.amazon.com/Terrible-Paradox-Self-Awareness-Awareness-Beginning/dp/B0FCDCCNJR/ref=tmm_pap_swatch_0 Other retailers available here (listed under Paperback and eBook): https://publishing.andrewsmcmeel.com/book/the-terrible-paradox-of-self-awareness/
In this video, we explore the diverse ways people think. Do you think primarily with visuals? Some people can't at all. Do you think primarily with an inner voice? Some people can't. Not only is this diversity of thought deeply fascinating and somewhat unnerving, but it has real implications on how people live and who they become.
Check out all Pursuit of Wonder books here: https://www.amazon.com/stores/Robert-Pantano/author/B08DCRJ85C?ref=ap_rdr&store_ref=ap_rdr&isDramIntegrated=true&shoppingPortalEnabled=true (Also available to more international
item.itunes:author: Pursuit of Wonder

item.title: Sean Carroll: Einstein’s most radical thought
item.description:
Become a Big Think member to unlock expert classes, premium print issues, exclusive events and more: https://bigthink.com/membership/?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=yt_desc “The messy reality of it is that all of these very smart people, including Isaac Newton, were talking to other people.”
Subscribe to Big Think on YouTube ► https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCvQECJukTDE2i6aCoMnS-Vg?sub_confirmation=1 Watch Sean Carroll's Full Interview with Big Think ► https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_TBNJyztai0
Albert Einstein altered the way we think about reality itself, and we often think of him as the most important physicist. But even his breakthroughs were part of a larger, tangled conversation among scientists stretching from Aristotle to Maxwell to Minkowski.
Sean Carroll, physicist and philosopher at Johns Hopkins University, traces how the universe emerged not from solitary genius, but from centuries of dialogue, error, and correction.
0:00 Einstein — underrated? 1:
item.itunes:author: Big Think

item.title: Your brain wasn't built to hold this much information | Richard Cytowic
item.description:
Become a Big Think member to unlock expert classes, premium print issues, exclusive events and more: https://bigthink.com/membership/?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=yt_desc
Subscribe to Big Think on YouTube ► https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCvQECJukTDE2i6aCoMnS-Vg?sub_confirmation=1 Up next, The terrifying ways that social media is altering teenage brains | Clare Morell: Full Interview ► https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tk_Q4DyWY48
Your brain isn’t broken, but it may seem like that because of how the screen age overwhelms your biology.
Neurologist Richard Cytowic argues that attention is a finite energy budget, not a virtue, and modern life is engineered to exhaust it.
Read the video transcript ► https://bigthink.com/series/the-big-think-interview/screen-age-brains/?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=video&utm_campaign=youtube_description
© Freethink Media Inc., All Rights Reserved.
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------
item.itunes:author: Big Think

item.title: ඉරාන-ඊශ්‍රායල්-ඇමරිකානු යුද්ධයේ වැඩි වාසි කාටද?
item.description: අද මම කතා කරන්නේ මේ දිනවල විසේශයෙන් අවධානයට ලක් වෙලා තියන ඉරාන-ඊශ්‍රායල්-ඇමරිකානු යුද්ධය පිළිබඳව. මේ පිලිබඳ පැහැදිලි සවිස්තාර්ත්මක විස්තරයක් කරන අතරම, මෙහි අනාගත පසුබිම කෙලෙස වෙයිද කියලා මම සොයා බලනවා මෙම වීඩියෝ එකෙන්.
item.itunes:author: Science With Ruchira

item.title: Yikes.
item.description:
Early March of 2026 became a defining moment in world history. For the first time AI was used in a major military operation, but that's just the beginning of the story. What followed was a betrayal by OpenAI, a slippery slope to mass surveillance and serious questions over what powers a government should have. In this episode we explore the nexus between AI, war and mass surveillance.
Watch or listen to ColdFusion on Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/1YEwCKoRz8fEDqheXB6UJ1
ColdFusion Music:
http://burnwater.bandcamp.com https://www.youtube.com/@coldfusionmusic
ColdFusion Socials:
https://discord.gg/coldfusion https://facebook.com/ColdFusionTV https://twitter.com/ColdFusion_TV https://instagram.com/coldfusiontv
Created by: Dagogo Altraide Producers: Tawsif Akkas, Dagogo Altraide
item.itunes:author: ColdFusion

item.title: Andrew Huberman: Peptides, Sleep Tech, and the End of Obesity
item.description:
Daisy Wolf speaks with Dr. Andrew Huberman, professor of neurobiology and ophthalmology at Stanford University and host of the Huberman Lab podcast. They discuss how the pandemic sparked a consumer health revolution, the emerging peptide and GLP landscape, what the science actually says about focus drugs, and the neurotechnologies Huberman believes will let us write to our own biology within the next five years.
Timestamps: 0:00—Introduction 1:15—The Health Awakening, Explained 7:02—MAHA's Role in the Health Movement 13:05—GLP-1: Nearly One in Seven Americans 18:37—The Non-GLP Peptide Craze 25:16—Rogue Experiments and Low-Dose GLP 31:40—Real-Time Cortisol Sensing 44:39—The Pet Octopus and AI Communication
Resources: Follow Andrew Huberman on X: https://twitter.com/hubermanlab Follow Daisy on X https://twitter.com/daisydwolf
Stay Updated: If you enjoyed this episode, be sure to like, subscribe, and share with your friends!
Find a16z on X: https://twitter.com/a16z
Find a16z on Lin
item.itunes:author: a16z

item.title: Does reading make you a better person? | Dominic Sandbrook | The New Society
item.description:
For one of the most famous historians in Britain, conquering the past is not enough.
This month, alongside co-host Tabitha Syrett, Dominic Sandbrook is launching a new podcast - this time shifting his focus from history to literature.
item.itunes:author: The New Society

item.title: AI Is A Massive Problem. Here's Why.
item.description:
AI is everywhere. It's a really big deal. And no one understands how it works -- really.
Follow our research at palisaderesearch.org
Massive thank you to Prof. Geoffrey Hinton for taking the time to talk to me about this, and leading the charge so well about the dangers of AI.
References -- https://docs.google.com/document/d/1x-vgy64VDwgR7U9tDoR6jk8JFZfAT3Y4Kh0y8OlpJbY/edit?usp=sharing
Great video on backdrop -- https://youtu.be/Ilg3gGewQ5U?si=dmqdyiFc-tAeAusO
Resources -- job -- https://jobs.80000hours.org learn -- https://bluedot.org talk to your politician -- https://ifanyonebuildsit.com/act
Massive thanks to Henry Reich who gave me so many important notes on this video -- it's much better due to your input. Thanks to everyone that gave me notes on this video -- the entire Palisade team and also Chana Messinger, Dr Mithuna Yoganathan, Dr Sumeet Kulkarni, Casper Mebius, Henry van Dyck, Gregor Čavlović.
Fabio, Jakub, Trenton -- you're the dream team. So glad to be working with
item.itunes:author: Palisade Research

item.title: නැහැ නැහැ.. තෙල් හින්දා නෙමෙයි, ඊට වඩා බොහොම භයානක දෙයක් නිසා
item.description: අද මේ වීඩියෝ එකෙන් මම කතා කරන්න ලැස්ති වෙලා ඉන්නේ පෙට්‍රෝඩොලර් නම් ඉතාම වැදගත් සන්කප්ලය පිළිබඳව. මෙම කරුණ තේරුම් ගැනීමෙන් තොරව මැදපෙරදිග ගලාපයේ බලය පතිරවීමක් ගැන හිතන්නවත් බැහැ!
item.itunes:author: Science With Ruchira

item.title: I’m begging you to write essays
item.description:
Supercharge your productivity with Akiflow! https://akiflow.pro/Odysseas
-
Join my newsletter: https://odysseas.link/newsletter
Read past issues: https://odysseas.link/archive
-
Edited by https://presage.media
-
Paper on handwriting: https://www.mdpi.com/2075-1729/15/3/345
-
Timestamps: 00:00-00:50 Intro 00:50-2:10 What is an essay? 2:10-8:30 Why essays help you learn 8:30-18:19 How to write essays (medium, style, topic)
item.itunes:author: Odysseas

item.title: අඩසියවසේ සටනට ඇමරිකාව කොච්චර සූදානම්ද?
item.description: ඉරාන, ඊශ්‍රායල් සහ ඇමරිකානු යුද්ධය මේ කාලයේ බෙහෙවින් අවධානයට ලක්වූ මාතෘකාවක්. මේ වෙනකොට මේ සටන, ගෝලීය බලශක්තිය වශයෙන් ඉතා වැදගත් සන්ධිස්ථානයක් වන හොමූස් සමුද්‍ර මාර්ගය පිළිබඳව වූ එකක් බවට පත් වී තිබෙනවා. මේ වීඩියෝ එකෙන් අපි කතා කරන්නේ ඒ පිළිබඳව.
item.itunes:author: Science With Ruchira

item.title: Alien Ships and Robots - ඇත්තටම අලුත් දැනුමක් නිර්මාණය කරන්න පුලුවන්ද? w/ Malinda Alahakoon
item.description:
Malinda Ahalakoon @TechTrackShow joins Manasgatha to discuss AI, robotics, philosophy and current affairs. Core AI Development FREE Webinar Registration: https://us06web.zoom.us/meeting/register/WZ4oHkJORwm9-AsmEU6n-Q
UI UX with AI FREE Webinar Registration: https://us06web.zoom.us/meeting/register/XZc61HKSQNadcQ1DwR8qmw
Video and VFX Production with AI FREE webinar Registration: https://us06web.zoom.us/meeting/register/f0XAjolfQxW2dtdLqavYSw ----- 👉 Support us on Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/SanjayaElvitigala to fund more exploratory work and help the education system of Sri Lanka with new ideas and ways of teaching & learning.,
item.itunes:author: Sanjaya Elvitigala

item.title: යුද්ධයේ දිශානතිය කුමක්ද?
item.description:
මාගෙ වැඩසටහන් ගැන ජාත්‍යන්තර විද්වතුන්ගේ ඇගයීම් 👉🏼 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ujrYpnEZtUs
මේ වසරේදී ජීවිතයේ දුර යන්න කැමති අයට මා සමඟ එකතු වෙන්න පුළුවන් අතික්‍රමණ වැඩසටහනට
සිංහල භාෂාවෙන් පවත්වන වැඩසටහනට ලියාපදිංචිය 👉🏼 https://student.intellectii.global/offers/hYQJBt2d/checkout
වැඩසටහන පිළිබඳව වැඩි විස්තර 👉🏼 https://intellectii.global/athikramana-faqs/
ඉංග්‍රීසි භාෂාවෙන් පවත්වන වැඩසටහනට ලියාපදිංචිය 👉🏼 https://student.intellectii.global/offers/DBDqr6va/checkout
වැඩසටහන අවසන් කල අයගේ ඇගයීම් 👉🏼 https://intellectii.global/online-courses/
🚀 ------------------------✴--------------------------- 🚀
පසුතල නිර්මාණය සහ වර්ණ සංස්කරණය: Ashani Wijesinghe (https://www.instagram.com/ashivibes.me/?hl=en) ___________________________
මූලාශ්‍ර වලින් කොටසක්: https://www.cnn.com/2026/02/28/politics/us-israel-attack-iran https://www.bbc.com/news/world-middle-east https://www.wsj.com/politics/national-security/us-gathers-air-power-mideast-iran https://flashpoint.io/blog/escalation-in-the-mi
item.itunes:author: Raamuwa

item.title: දැන් වෙනකොට ට්‍රම්ප්ට තේරීම් 3ක් තියනවා, තුනම අමාරුයි! : මට ෂුවර් හැබැයි තෝරන්නේ 3 වෙනි එක
item.description: මම මේ වීඩියෝ එකෙන් කතා කරන්නේ ඉරාන-ඇමරිකානු-ඊශ්‍රායල් යුද්ධය පිළිබඳව. විසේශයෙන් සති තුනකට පස්සේ විවිධ පාර්ශව යුද්ධේ කරපු හැටි සහ ඒ අයට ඉදිරියේ තියන අවස්ථා ගැන. අවසානයේ මේ යුද්ධේ ට්‍රම්ප්ට ඉතිරි වෙලා තියෙන්නේ බොහොම අමාරු තේරීම් තුනක්.
item.itunes:author: Science With Ruchira

item.title: බෞද්ධ දර්ශනය හා විද්‍යාව පිළිබඳව කෙරෙන සාකච්ඡාව Watagoda Magga Wihari Thero with Mr Ruchira Wijesena
item.description:
අපි කියන්නේ පේන දේ, අපි කියන්නෙ පේන දේට එහා දෙයක් තියෙනවා. බෞද්ධ දර්ශනය හා විද්‍යාව පිළිබඳව මුල්වරට පන්සිල් මළුවේදී කෙරෙන සාකච්ඡාව පූජ්‍ය වටගොඩ මග්ග විහාරි ස්වාමීන් වහන්සේ සමගින් ආචාර්ය රුචිර විජේසේන මහතා
ඉදිරිපත් කිරීම - ශාලිකා රණසිංහ සංස්කරණය - ඉඳුවර බන්ඩාර
#pansilmaluwa #sirasafm #buddagaya #bodipooja
මෙවැනි දේශනා තවදුරටත් නරඹන්න, අප නාලිකාව Subscribe කරන්න. Facebook - https://web.facebook.com/pansilmaluwasirasafm/
MBC Digital Productions.
item.itunes:author: Pansil Maluwa - පන්සිල් මළුව

item.title: Iron Dome ස්ථර තුනම කපාගෙන ඉරානය හැමදාම එයාලගේ සතුරන්ට මිසයිල වට්ටන්නේ කොහොමද?
item.description: අද මේ වීඩියෝ එකෙන් මම කතා කරන්න යන්නේ ඉරානය කොහොමද ලෝකයේ හොඳම මිසයිල ආරක්ෂණ පද්ධති ලෙස හඳුන්වපු ඊශ්‍රායල් සහ ඇමෙරිකානු පද්ධති විදගෙන දිනපතාම පාහේ මිසයිල ඒ රටවල් වලට පතිත කරන්නේ කියන කරුණ. ඒ සමග මම පැහැදලි කරනවා කොහොමද ඉරානය මිසයිල භාවිතා කරමින් යුධ ක්‍රමයක් ගොඩ නැගුවේ කියන කරුණ.
item.itunes:author: Science With Ruchira
